With.Name: Main

IfRequest.Cte: SELECT SUM(ActualStockOriginStore) AS TotalActualStockOriginStore, SUM(IdealStockOriginStore) AS TotalIdealStockOriginStore FROM (SELECT OriginPointOfSaleId, ProductId, ActualStockOriginStore, IdealStockOriginStore FROM FilteredTransferDataCte GROUP BY OriginPointOfSaleId, ProductId, ActualStockOriginStore, IdealStockOriginStore ) AS Grouped

SELECT SUM(ActualStockDestinationStore) AS TotalActualStockDestinationStore, SUM(IdealStockDestinationStore) AS TotalIdealStockDestinationStore FROM (SELECT DestinationPointOfSaleId, ProductId, ActualStockDestinationStore, IdealStockDestinationStore FROM FilteredTransferDataCte GROUP BY DestinationPointOfSaleId, ProductId, ActualStockDestinationStore, IdealStockDestinationStore ) AS Grouped

With.Cte: SELECT {{ Fields -Dimension: PointsOfSaleSource -Dimension: PointsOfSaleTarget -Dimension: Products -WithComma }} TransferType, {{ IfRequest -Expression: ActualStockOriginStore --MAX(ActualStockOriginStore) AS ActualStockOriginStore -Expression: IdealStockOriginStore --MAX(IdealStockOriginStore) AS IdealStockOriginStore -Expression: ActualStockDestinationStore --MAX(ActualStockDestinationStore) AS ActualStockDestinationStore -Expression: IdealStockDestinationStore --MAX(IdealStockDestinationStore) AS IdealStockDestinationStore -Expression: CostPVM --SUM(CostPVM) AS CostPVM -Expression: TotalTransfersOut --SUM(TotalTransfersOut) AS TotalTransfersOut -Expression: DaysInStore --MIN(DaysInStore) AS DaysInStore -Expression: Sales --SUM(Sales) AS Sales -Expression: Margin --SUM(Margin) AS Margin -Expression: MarginPercentage --IsNull((SUM(Margin) * 100) / NullIf(SUM(Sales), 0), 0) AS MarginPercentage }} FROM FilteredTransferDataCte {{ GroupBy -Dimension: PointsOfSaleSource -Dimension: PointsOfSaleTarget -Dimension: Products -Sql --TransferType }}
With.Query: SELECT {{ Fields -Dimension: PointsOfSaleSource --Table: GroupedCte -Dimension: PointsOfSaleTarget --Table: GroupedCte -Dimension: Products --Table: GroupedCte -WithComma }} GroupedCte.TransferType, {{ IfRequest -Expression: ActualStockOriginStore --GroupedCte.ActualStockOriginStore -Expression: IdealStockOriginStore --GroupedCte.IdealStockOriginStore -Expression: ActualStockDestinationStore --GroupedCte.ActualStockDestinationStore -Expression: IdealStockDestinationStore --GroupedCte.IdealStockDestinationStore -Expression: CostPVM --GroupedCte.CostPVM -Expression: TotalTransfersOut --GroupedCte.TotalTransfersOut -Expression: DaysInStore --GroupedCte.DaysInStore -Expression: Sales --GroupedCte.Sales -Expression: Margin --GroupedCte.Margin -Expression: MarginPercentage --GroupedCte.MarginPercentage -WhenRequestTotals --Default ---COUNT(*) OVER () AS TotalCount --Expression: ActualStockOriginStore ---StockOriginCte.TotalActualStockOriginStore --Expression: IdealStockOriginStore ---StockOriginCte.TotalIdealStockOriginStore --Expression: ActualStockDestinationStore ---StockDestinationCte.TotalActualStockDestinationStore --Expression: IdealStockDestinationStore ---StockDestinationCte.TotalIdealStockDestinationStore --Expression: CostPVM ---SUM(GroupedCte.CostPVM) OVER() AS TotalCostPVM --Expression: TotalTransfersOut ---SUM(GroupedCte.TotalTransfersOut) OVER () AS TotalTotalTransfersOut --Expression: DaysInStore ---SUM(GroupedCte.DaysInStore) OVER() AS TotalDaysInStore --Expression: Sales ---SUM(GroupedCte.Sales) OVER() AS TotalSales --Expression: Margin ---SUM(GroupedCte.Margin) OVER() AS TotalMargin --Expression: MarginPercentage ---SUM(GroupedCte.MarginPercentage) OVER() AS TotalMarginPercentage }} FROM GroupedCte {{ IfRequest -WhenRequestTotals --Expression: ActualStockOriginStore;IdealStockOriginStore ---WithoutComma ---CROSS JOIN StockOriginCte --Expression: ActualStockDestinationStore;IdealStockDestinationStore ---WithoutComma ---CROSS JOIN StockDestinationCte }} {{ OrderBy -Dimension: PointsOfSaleSource --Table: GroupedCte -Dimension: PointsOfSaleTarget --Table: GroupedCte -Dimension: Products --Table: GroupedCte -Sql --GroupedCte.TransferType }} {{Pagination}}
